list.historyEntry: v% it's what i was thinking of
how to make it popup in center
how to give it a 800x800 size
how to make this window float?

I'm getting the following error while syncing my project. The error is: copyNonXmlValueResourcesForJvmMain task was failed: ``` $ ./gradlew :composeApp:copyNonXmlValueResourcesForJvmMain copyNonXmlValueResourcesForJvmMain task was failed: org.gradle.api.GradleException: Invalid Timestamp -2147483648000 for 'file '/home/lighttigerxiv/Downloads/xeeta/composeApp/src/jvmMain/composeResources/drawable''. at org.gradle.api.internal.file.AbstractFileTreeElement.validateTimeStamps(AbstractFileTreeElement.java:96) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.AbstractFileTreeElement.copyTo(AbstractFileTreeElement.java:78) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.DefaultFileCopyDetails.copyTo(DefaultFileCopyDetails.java:137) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.FileCopyAction$FileCopyDetailsInternalAction.processFile(FileCopyAction.java:49) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.maybeVisit(NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.java:104) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.lambda$execute$0(NormalizingCopyActionDecorator.java:71) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.DuplicateHandlingCopyActionDecorator.lambda$execute$0(DuplicateHandlingCopyActionDecorator.java:71) at org.gradle.api.internal.file.copy.CopyFileVisitorImpl.processFile(CopyFileVisitorImpl.java:68) ``` How do I fix this?
